# Version 4.151.0
> **Performance and m151 engine** · [NuGet (prerelease)](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/4.151.0-preview)

> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](4.151.0/index.md) · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](harfbuzzsharp/14.2.1/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 previews the Skia m151 engine update with broad managed-code performance improvements. It eliminates allocations in hot paths across HarfBuzzSharp, SKShaper, SKColor, and SKFourByteTag, fixes a native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData, and adds Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries for .NET 11 WebAssembly.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Skia updated to milestone m151** — The bundled renderer moves to Chrome milestone 151, including three rounds of upstream bug-fix syncs that land on top of the initial milestone bump. ([#4294](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4294), [#4312](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4312), [#4382](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4382), [#4443](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4443))
- **WebAssembly build warnings removed** — Drops the duplicate SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM define from the Skia submodule so Emscripten builds no longer report macro redefinition noise. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#3788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3788))

## API Surface

- **SKColor hex parsing accepts ReadOnlySpan<char>** — SKColor.Parse and TryParse gain ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads and the hex-to-component path is rewritten to avoid intermediate allocations. ([#4345](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4345))
- **GRContextOptions no longer requires unsafe context** — The unnecessary unsafe modifier is removed from GRContextOptions, making the type usable without enabling unsafe code in calling projects. ([#3991](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3991))
- **HarfBuzzSharp and SKShaper hot paths go allocation-free** — HarfBuzzSharp.Buffer.AddUtf8 uses a pooled UTF-8 encoder instead of allocating per call; HarfBuzzSharp.Tag.Parse and SKFourByteTag.Parse drop their per-call char[4] allocations; SKShaper reads glyph results through zero-copy spans. ([#4376](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4376), [#4408](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4408), [#4396](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4396), [#4388](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4388))

## Bug Fixes

- **Native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData fixed** — The SKRectI overload of SKImage.FromEncodedData was leaking a native reference on every call; the handle is now correctly released. ([#3997](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3997))
- **CPU raster regression from m151 resolved** — Restores SK_ENABLE_LEGACY_SHADERCONTEXT so the CPU rasteriser produces correct output after the m151 engine update. ([#4428](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4428))

## Platform

- **Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries for .NET 11 WebAssembly** — Adds the Emscripten 5.0.6 native slices required to run SkiaSharp under .NET 11 WebAssembly. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#4459](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4459))

## HarfBuzzSharp 14.2.1

Picks up HarfBuzz 14.2.1 and eliminates allocations in the Tag.Parse hot path and the Buffer.AddUtf8 text-encode path.

## Community Contributors ❤️

Thank you to everyone who contributed to this release!

## Preview 2 (July 14, 2026)

Preview 2 added the managed-performance sweep — allocation-free HarfBuzzSharp.Buffer.AddUtf8, zero-copy SKShaper glyph reads, ReadOnlySpan<char> SKColor parsing, the GRContextOptions unsafe removal, and the SKImage.FromEncodedData leak fix.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.151.0-preview.1.1...v4.151.0-preview.2.1)

## Preview 1 (July 2, 2026)

Preview 1 opened the 4.151 line with the Skia m151 engine update and the WebAssembly build cleanup.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.150.1...v4.151.0-preview.1.1)
